security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Multi-agent Linux terminal with isolated git worktrees and desktop notifications.
bundle.longDescription: ForkTTY is a Linux desktop terminal designed for running multiple AI coding agents in parallel. It combines split-pane terminals, isolated git worktrees, prompt-aware desktop notifications, session restore, and a local socket API for automation.
